title: carlina pygmaea
intro: Carlina pygmaea, also known as Dwarf Carline Thistle, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which help to soothe digestive issues and promote wound healing. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving respiratory function, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Carlina pygmaea is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal properties.
